items.title: RAQAM Attends International Packaging Expo in Afghanistan
items.content:
RAQAM International, a leading provider of labeling and packaging solutions, recently attended the International Packaging Expo in Afghanistan. The expo, which took place in Kabul, brought together industry professionals from around the world to showcase the latest innovations in packaging technology and design.

RAQAM was excited to participate in the expo and to showcase its wide range of packaging solutions to the Afghan market. The company displayed its FLEXCEL NX Mid production system, a state-of-the-art digital flexographic printing press that offers high-quality printing and flexible production capabilities. RAQAM also highlighted its other packaging solutions, including custom labels and packaging designs, as well as its expertise in sustainable packaging options.

During the expo, RAQAM received a great deal of interest from attendees and was able to establish new business relationships in the Afghan market. The company is looking forward to building on these relationships and to bringing its innovative packaging solutions to Afghanistan.

“We are thrilled to have attended the International Packaging Expo in Afghanistan and to have had the opportunity to showcase our solutions to such a diverse and interested audience,” said RAQAM CEO, Khalid Aziz Shah. “We look forward to continuing to grow our presence in Afghanistan and to supporting the country’s packaging industry.”
items.excerpt: RAQAM International, a leading provider of labeling and packaging solutions, recently attended the International Packaging Expo in Afghanistan...

items.title: RAQAM International chooses FLEXCEL NX Mid production systems for Pakistan expansion
items.content:
RAQAM International Labels and Packaging Pvt. Ltd is pleased to announce its expansion into Pakistan, with a FLEXCEL NX Mid System from Miraclon.

The packaging and label converter required a plate imaging and processing system, and the FLEXCEL NX System’s hybrid option proved to be the only technology that could meet all their requirements.

“With two FLEXCEL NX Systems already installed at our production facilities in Canada and the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia (KSA), we are familiar with the undeniable production, reliability, and quality benefits it delivers,” says Khalid Aziz Shah, CEO of RAQAM International Canada, KSA and Pakistan. “These systems have required minimal maintenance over the past seven years, ensuring excellent productivity and on-time delivery. It also allows us to achieve solid ink density and higher line screens. It really was the only option for us as we enter the label and packaging production market in Pakistan.”
items.excerpt: RAQAM International Labels and Packaging Pvt. Ltd is pleased to announce its strategic partnership with Kodak's FLEXCEL NX Mid production systems...

items.title: How RAQAM International Compete with Bigger Companies
items.content:
How do you compare to big competitors? What makes RAQAM International different and special?

Packaging manufacturers in the Middle East are facing disruption, both in terms of how they do business and opening up new markets. One packaging manufacturer under the spotlight is Riyadh-based RAQAM International, a dynamic company that’s doing its best to keep pace with changing trends and demands. Khalid Aziz Shah, MD of RAQAM International tells Packaging MEA Editor Ben Daniel how the company competes with bigger competitors, and why difficulties in Saudi business affected them less than others. He told more about how RAQAM International is fighting back against disruption and why size doesn’t mean everything.

He says that brand owners do not strive to introduce anything new. Instead, they follow others with minimal product changes at a very low cost. Brand owners with good products have not been able to keep up with this strategy.

“Most label jobs do not fit into the wide web option, as they demand more volume. We can do smaller volumes in much faster times, and also more competitively. There’s no need to fight, because there is room for more opportunities. Hence, I say that RAQAM International in an innovative company. We are trying to introduce something different within narrow web. Nobody can compete with us. If we have 20-30 customers, that should suffice. The packaging industry is vast. In Riyadh alone there are millions of customers”.
items.excerpt: How do you compare to big competitors? What makes RAQAM International stand out in a market dominated by larger corporations?

items.title: Dubai International Print Award (DIPA) Winners 2013
items.content:
We are happy to announce that the Dubai International Print Awards (DIPA) has named 77 winners in its recently held printing contest at the Madinat Jumeirah in Dubai.

Dipa held the awarding ceremonies under the partronage of Sheikh Maktoum Bin Mohammed Bin Rashid Al-Maktoum, depurty ruler of Dubai, with the collaboration of Dubai Chamber. The awarding was organized by the Printing & Publishing Group.

The awarding ceremony was attended by more than 500 printing industry professionals to witness the winner receiving their sought-after DIPA trophies.

In the Flexo Narrow Category, Gold went to RAQAM International Label & Ribbons Factory with silver being awarded to El Yaman Group, and Bronze to Kimoha Entrepreneurs LTD – SG
items.excerpt: We are happy to announce that the Dubai International Print Award (DIPA) has recognized RAQAM International for our outstanding contributions...
